try
{
    await GNUServices.DecryptAsync(fileBytes, outputms);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    _logger.LogError(
        ex,
        "DIA decryption failed. FileName: {FileName}",
        payload.FileName);

    await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyFailureAsync(
        payload.FileName,
        "DecryptionFailure",
        ex,
        cancellationToken);

    throw;
}
